title: Set up TanStack Query v5 (React Query) for server state management
summary: Install @tanstack/react-query, configure QueryClientProvider, implement useQuery and useMutation patterns, add server-side prefetching in Next.js App Router, and handle pagination.
declaration: I will set up TanStack Query v5 (formerly React Query) for async server state management. This handles fetching, caching, background refetching, and synchronization. If you're using tRPC (which bundles its own TanStack Query integration), tell me — the setup is different.
